title: geranium cataractarum var. pitardii
intro: Geranium cataractarum var. pitardii, also known as Pitard's geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Geranium cataractarum var. pitardii are numerous, with it being used to alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings, as well as to reduce anxiety and promote a good night's sleep. Geranium cataractarum var. pitardii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
